currentFAQs.q: How much does a paver patio cost in {{CITY}}?
currentFAQs.a: Most homeowners in {{CITY}} pay between {{AVG_LOW}} and {{AVG_HIGH}} for a paver patio, depending on size and materials chosen.

currentFAQs.q: How long does a paver patio last?
currentFAQs.a: A properly installed paver patio can last 25-50 years with minimal maintenance. Pavers can be individually replaced if damaged, making them a long-lasting investment.

currentFAQs.q: Do I need a permit for landscaping work?
currentFAQs.a: Permits are typically required for retaining walls over 4 feet tall, major grading changes, and drainage work that affects neighboring properties. Check with your local building department in {{CITY}}.
